message:
Harden SSH socket security and improve lock handling

SSH control directory security (ssh.rs, transfer.rs):
- Set restrictive permissions (0700) on SSH control directories
- Prevents symlink attacks and unauthorized access to control sockets
- Include username in fallback temp path to prevent cross-user conflicts
- Proper #[cfg(unix)] guards for permission operations

RwLock poison recovery (history.rs):
- Replace all .unwrap() calls with .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
- Allows continued operation after a thread panic holding a lock
- Prevents cascading failures when one request panics
- Maintains data consistency while improving resilience

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
